_note: Verified archive anchors for the SF 150-year budget timeline. RULE: every figure is the single citywide headline total AS PRINTED in a scanned City & County of San Francisco serial financial report on the Internet Archive - transcribed verbatim, never inferred or interpolated. `value_nominal` is the untouched scan figure; `quote` is an exact whitespace-normalized substring of the item's _djvu.txt (export re-verifies it against the live OCR and skips any point that no longer grounds). `measure` records what the figure is (receipts / expenditures / total budget) because the historical serials report different top-lines across eras; the tiers are never merged into one authoritative line. `leaf` is the 0-based scan leaf for the page-level deep link, mapped from _hocr_pageindex.
